fault_hypothesis: On line 61, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series is shorter than the window, this produces an incorrectly small result because the divisor is larger than the number of actual samples.

constraints.intent: After computing avg, it should equal total divided by the actual tail length, not by window.

spec.expr: len(tail__1) >= window or abs(avg__1 - total__1 / len(tail__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: When tail is shorter than window, avg must be total/len(tail), not total/window.
Before using avg in the return, verify it represents the mean of the actual tail elements.
The returned value should be the mean of the tail elements, not total divided by window.
